ops.text: {"config":{"cell":"synthesis","deliverables":["A1a","A1b","A1c","A2","A2v","A3"],"phase":"phase-3","seed":1729},"config_hash":"80d35ef46f15","dataset_digest":"a054d90e87d6f0a9","experiment":"eval-v2","metrics":{"e2_two_stage_prose_win_or_tie":0.0,"e2_two_stage_qa_win_or_tie":0.0,"empty_context_eval_rows":176,"leakage_contamination_content":0.0325,"leakage_contamination_raw":0.2998,"leakage_cosine_pairs":1418,"leakage_empty_context_rows":176,"qa_fired_n":49,"qa_option_resolution_accuracy":0.0333,"qa_scoreable_n":60,"rubric_garbage_same_direction":0.02,"rubric_paraphrase_same_direction":0.98,"rubric_validation_passed":1,"rubric_verbatim_same_direction":0.98,"sidecar_n_empty_source":185,"sidecar_n_rows":637,"sidecar_n_unmatched":0},"seed":1729,"verdict":"eval-v2 machinery (A1-A3) built and validated against frozen eval-v1 (637 rows). A1a source-kind sidecar: 637/637 joined, 0 unmatched, 185 empty-source negatives; QA=268 dominates positives. A2 rubric judge ADOPTED: A2v validation PASS on 50 prose rows (verbatim same_direction 0.980 [0.940,1.000], paraphrase 0.980 delta 0.000, garbage 0.020) \u2014 a healthy single-candidate judge where the pairwise judge was structurally 0-win. A1c reframes E2: the two-stage watcher loses 0W/0T UNIFORMLY across every source_kind and category (prose 0/0/10, question_answer 0/0/51), so the 0-win result is not a QA-only option-label artifact \u2014 it is uniform, disentangling metric-framing from watcher quality. A1b option-resolution accuracy 0.033 (2/60 scoreable): the metric correctly resolves the 2 engaged drafts and returns none for 41 identical hallucinated boilerplate drafts. A3 leakage: raw contamination 0.300 but content-bearing only 0.033 (15/461); the raw number is dominated by 176/637 empty-context rows. CROSS-CUTTING ROOT CAUSE: 176 eval rows (28%, incl. 149 question_answer) have draft_text collapsing to <assistant>\\n because their trigger turn is an empty assistant message \u2014 the watcher-lora sees no context, driving both the QA option-resolution failure and the uniform pairwise losses. This is the empirical case for the Phase-4 B1 structural-rendering fix. Gates: pytest 220 pass, ruff clean, ty clean (macOS + Linux docker)."}
